assessments.rationale: Most boom chord and arm chord cross-sections fall within 160 mm. Oversized sections can be split into two parallel profiles.
S355J2 and S690QL are within ZOLLERN's cold-draw and hot-roll grade range. 42CrMo4 and C45 for pivot pins also available.
Slide guide channels and wear strips requiring IH are well within 4,000 mm2 limit. Boom chord profiles typically do not require IH.
Construction equipment operates outdoors year-round. Steel profiles require corrosion protection (painting or weathering steel grade).
assessments.mitigation: Specify S355J2W weathering steel or apply zinc-rich primer post-production for exposed frame members

assessments.rationale: ZOLLERN provides EN 10204 3.1 material test reports as standard delivery. CE marking traceability requirement is met.
